title: biota semperaurescens
intro: Biota semperaurescens, also known as the ever-burning plant or Biota orientalis, is a type of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiviral agent. Biota semperaurescens can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or extract, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
